column1: man honestly i agree with you but i have also observed a few things 1 indians who often travel to other countries or start traveling outside india at an early age have the etiquettes of social decency eg being quite using headphones maintaining calm and being polite even when they are rushing somewhere 2 in the recent days in india i observed that the traffic and behavior of indians have changed quite a lot since i left in 2022 people for some reason have zero patience are very aggressive rude and impolite like why this was not the case when i left in 2022 well at least it was not this severe one reason thru which i found to get an explanation for this behavior is the increase in consumption of short format content yt shorts insta reels etc etc which has been scientifically shown to reduce the attention span in adults with an increase in irritability and aggressiveness that s the only explanation i found behind the change in behavior i observed in 2022 and now in 2024 now coming onto the point of representing india in other countries well the increase in purchasing power of indians and growing rate of people traveling to western countries for their first big trip is also a factor as these people largely treat these trips as a they would treat a trip within india failing to realize the mere fact that they should respect the culture of the country they are in and while being rooted to india i have seen people litter places they visit cigarette butts on the roadside train tracks in europe does not mean you are given permission to throw wrappers of chocolates chips packages on the road train platforms if people around you are talking quietly take a hint and behave as such in india everyone is so loud you subconsciously think oh i m speaking at a normal volume but when you are in say germany or switzerland where everyone mostly is quite then please lower down your volume as what is normal in india is very loud in these countries now coming onto the point of baggage claim dude engineers designed the conveyer belt system so no matter your location around the said belt you ll get your bags don t crowd around the place where the bag is falling sliding onto the belt it ll delay everyone and can also cause injuries amongst people help the disabled they have a relatively hard time make their lives slightly easier now amongst tons of other issues i still feel proud when an indian decides to help a foreigner eg as i m sitting in my car at a red light an indian decides to help an old lady cross the road which took 2 whole lights to cross the street taking hell of a time sure he could have crossed it quickly within the time limit given for crossing but given this lady s age and walking speed it took them 2 lights that was a wholesome and proud moment for me regardless i love india and it s a country people are starting to become aware about in distant lands where there aren t many indians just change your ways a bit when at the homeland of other people that s all just like they say jaisa desh waisa bhes
